name: Latency symptom
when_to_use: p99 spike, tail-latency regression, slow request reported

name: Throughput symptom
when_to_use: RPS ceiling, scalability cliff, queueing collapse

name: Resource symptom
when_to_use: Saturation, OOM, disk fill, GC pressure, pool exhaustion

name: Tracing symptom
when_to_use: Missing spans, broken context, blind spots in the dependency graph

name: Log symptom
when_to_use: Log volume blowup, missing correlation, signal lost in noise

name: Metric symptom
when_to_use: Cardinality blowup, missing series, dashboard does not answer the question

name: SLO symptom
when_to_use: Error-budget burn, paging on noise, SLI does not reflect user experience
